base_template.name: TRMM_Base v1.1
base_template.html:
<html>

<head>
    <style>
        /* —— PDF page settings —— */
        @page {
            margin: 0.5in;
            size: letter portrait;
        }

        /* —— Color palette (theme) —— */
        :root {
            --header-bg: #2c3e50;
            --header-text: #ffffff;
            --border-color: #dddddd;
            --table-header-bg: #f2f2f2;
            --status-ready-bg: #eaf7ec;
            --status-ready-badge: #28a745;
            --status-not-ready-bg: #fbebee;
            --status-not-ready-badge: #dc3545;
            --status-unknown-bg: #fff9e6;
            --status-unknown-badge: #ffc107;
            --badge-already-bg: #17a2b8;
        }

        /* —— Typography & utilities (structure) —— */
        body {
            font-family: sans-serif;
            color: #333;
            font-size: 12px;
        }

        .section {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .text-danger {
            color: #a94442;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        /* —— Header layout (structure) —— */
        .report-header {
            background-color: var(--header-bg);
            color: var(--header-text);
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .header-logo {
            width: 80px;
            margin-right: 25px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .header-date {
            margin-left: auto;
            text-align: right;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .report-header h1 {
            font-size: 24px;
            margin: 0 0 5px;
        }

        .report-header h2 {
            font-size: 16px;
            margin: 0;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* —— Standardized Table Styles (structure) —— */
        .report-table {
            border-collapse: collapse;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .report-table th,
        .report-table td {
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 6px 8px;
            text-align: left;
            vertical-align: top;
        }

        .report-table thead th {
            background-color: var(--table-header-bg);
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }

        /* Header label + sort indicators */
        .th-topline {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: .4rem;
        }

        .th-label {
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }

        /* These are the specific rules that make the indicator visible */
        th.sorted.asc .th-label::after {
            content: "▲";
            padding-left: .4rem;
            color: #333;
            font-size: .9em;
        }

        th.sorted.desc .th-label::after {
            content: "▼";
            padding-left: .4rem;
            color: #333;
            font-size: .9em;
        }

        .report-table thead th select {
            width: 100%;
            margin-top: 5px;
            padding: 4px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid #ccc;
            font-weight: normal;
            background: #fff;
        }

        /* —— Badge shape (structure) —— */
        .status-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: #fff;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-align: center;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /* —— Stub classes for per‑report overrides —— */
        .status-ready {}

        .status-not-ready {}

        .status-unknown {}

        .badge-ready {}

        .badge-not-ready {}

        .badge-unknown {}

        .badge-already {}
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    {% block content %}{% endblock %}
</body>

</html>

template.name: Agent Uptime (html) v1.6
template.template_variables:
report_run_timestamp: !now
timedelta_30_days: !now days=-30
data_sources:
  allFieldsAlerts:
    model: alert
    only:
      - agent__hostname
      - message
      - alert_time
      - resolved_on
      - alert_type
      - agent_id
      - resolved
      - agent__site__name
      - agent__site__client__name
